version_description: This is based on the studio recorded version of the song, from the single.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
| [ch]F#m[/ch]  | [ch]F#m[/ch]  |


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 He said, "Are you serious? I've tried, but I can't figure out[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 I've been next to you all night and still don't know what you're about[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 You keep t-t-talking, but not much coming out your mouth[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
 Can't you tell that I want you?" I say, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, please believe me[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
I'll put you through hell just to know me, yeah-yeah[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
So sure of yourself[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, don't get greedy[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
That shit won't end well[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, end well[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]Bm[/ch]                                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
 I see you eyeing me down, but you'll never know much past my name[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]E[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
Or how I'm running this room around and that I'm still half your age[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Yeah, you're l-l-looking at me like I'm some sweet escape[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]E[/ch]
Obvious that you want me, but I said[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, please believe me[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
I'll put you through hell just to know me, yeah-yeah[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
So sure of yourself[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, don't get greedy[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
That shit won't end well[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, end well[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]F#m[/ch]
 He said, "I'm just curious, is this for real or just an act?[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]
Can't tell if you love or hate me, never met someone like that[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Drive me so so so crazy, did you know you got that effect?"[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
I said, "lemme check", yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, please believe me[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
I'll put you through hell just to know me, yeah-yeah[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
So sure of yourself[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, don't get greedy[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
That shit won't end well[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
End well[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
